plugins.name: mcp-1shot-api
plugins.description: 1Shot API is a high-throughput transaction relayer service for EVM blockchain networks. It provides extensive tooling for facilitating agentic payments and web3 product development. 1Shot API's mcp server exposes tools to AI-coding environments like Cursor to produce fully-functional onchain agents and products that interact with smart contracts with minimal prompting.

plugins.name: mcp-21st-dev-magic-ai-agent
plugins.description: Magic AI Agent is an AI-driven tool designed to assist developers in creating modern UI components through natural language descriptions, streamlining the UI development process.

plugins.name: mcp-activepieces-mcp-server
plugins.description:
Connect 300+ apps (for example, Slack, Stripe, Shopify, Trello, Notion, and many other apps) to  AI assistants like Claude, Cursor, and Windsurf in a very secure environment for free. Activepieces is SOC 2 Type II compliant and also certified by MIT

Learn more about Activepieces MCP server here: https://www.activepieces.com/mcp

plugins.name: mcp-adobe-commerce-magento
plugins.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool for integrating with the Adobe Commerce/ Magento REST API. No direct SQL or server access required.

plugins.name: mcp-agent-interviews
plugins.description: AI interviews as-a-service. Use AI to connect with real humans at scale.

plugins.name: mcp-apify-rag-web-browser
plugins.description: Web browser for LLM apps similar to a web browser in ChatGPT. It queries Google Search, scrapes the top N pages from the results, and returns their cleaned content as Markdown.

plugins.name: mcp-ashra-mcp-server
plugins.description: Extract structured data from any website with a simple SDK call. No scraping code, no headless browsers - just prompt and get JSON.

plugins.name: mcp-atlassian-2
plugins.description: https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp

plugins.name: mcp-autodock
plugins.description: Autodock copies your local work to a cloud environment and gives you secure, live URLs to your frontend, backend, and any other services. No setup, no CORS issues, no port forwarding, no "I accidentally left the server on overnight."

plugins.name: mcp-aws-api-mcp-server
plugins.description: The AWS API MCP Server enables AI assistants to interact with AWS services and resources through AWS CLI commands. It provides programmatic access to manage your AWS infrastructure while maintaining proper security controls.

plugins.name: mcp-aws-knowledge-mcp-1
plugins.description: A fully managed remote MCP server that provides up-to-date documentation, code samples, and other official AWS content.

plugins.name: mcp-axiom
plugins.description: Query and analyze logs, traces, and event data using natural language

plugins.name: mcp-baz-agentic-code-review
plugins.description: Baz is an AI-powered coding platform leveraging specialized models and embeddings to address the limitations of traditional coding tools. Developers no longer have to manually piece together the impact of pull requests; Baz models, analyzes and reviews code changes, detecting breaking changes, enforcing consistency, and highlighting misaligned coding patterns. Baz makes every review faster, more accurate, and aligned with the real-world impact of the code changes being made.

plugins.name: mcp-brave-search
plugins.description: Web and local search using Brave's Search API

plugins.name: mcp-browser-mcp
plugins.description: Automate your local Chrome browser

plugins.name: mcp-browserbase
plugins.description: This server provides cloud browser automation capabilities using Browserbase, Puppeteer, and Stagehand (Coming Soon). This server enables LLMs to interact with web pages, take screenshots, and execute JavaScript in a cloud browser environment.

plugins.name: mcp-browsertools-mcp
plugins.description: Analyze logs & interact with your browser for rapid debugging

plugins.name: mcp-caiyun-weather
plugins.description:
Caiyun Weather is a weather data service that provides real-time weather information, forecasts, and historical weather data through an API.

Key features of Caiyun Weather:
- Real-time weather data retrieval for specific locations.
- Hourly and daily weather forecasts.
- Historical weather data for the past 24 hours.
- Weather alerts for specific locations.
Comprehensive weather metrics including temperature, humidity, wind speed, and air quality indices.

plugins.name: mcp-callhub-mcp
plugins.description: Create Campaigns & more with your CallHub Account

plugins.name: mcp-cashfree-mcp
plugins.description: Cashfree MCP server for cashfree docs and APIs

plugins.name: mcp-cloudflare
plugins.description: Cloudflare MCP Server is a tool designed to deploy, configure, and interact with resources on the Cloudflare developer platform, including Workers, KV storage, R2 storage, and D1 databases, through the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

plugins.name: mcp-cockroachdb-mcp-server
plugins.description: The CockroachDB MCP Server is a natural language interface designed for agentic applications to manage, monitor and query data in CockroachDB.

plugins.name: mcp-compresto-mcp
plugins.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Compresto, providing AI assistants with real-time data about Compresto's usage statistics.

plugins.name: mcp-convex
plugins.description: Cursor, the AI code editor, makes it easy to write and maintain apps built with Convex. Let's walk through how to setup Cursor for the best possible results with Convex.

plugins.name: mcp-cursor-mcp-installer-mcp
plugins.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for installing and configuring other MCP servers within Cursor IDE.

plugins.name: mcp-cursor10x
plugins.description: The Cursor10x MCP is a persistent multi-dimensional memory system for Cursor that enhances AI assistants with conversation context, project history, and code relationships across sessions.

plugins.name: mcp-cyclops
plugins.description:
Cyclops MCP allows your favorite AI agent to manage your Kubernetes applications. Cyclops MCP server provides tools for agents to create and update existing applications safely.

With Cyclops MCP, you can now abstract Kubernetes complexity from your developers AND your AI Agents 🔥

plugins.name: mcp-dbhub
plugins.description: Universal database MCP server connecting to MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, SQLite, and etc.

plugins.name: mcp-deployhq
plugins.description: MCP server for DeployHQ that enables AI agents to interact with your deployment automation platform. Provides comprehensive tools for managing projects, servers, and deployments through natural language.

plugins.name: mcp-devcontext
plugins.description: DevContext is a state-of-the-art context management system for software development, implementing the Model Context Protocol (MCP) with advanced context retrieval techniques. Empower your development workflow with intelligent context awareness - DevContext understands your codebase, conversations, and development patterns to provide relevant context exactly when you need it.

plugins.name: mcp-docker
plugins.description: Manage containers, images, volumes, and networks

plugins.name: mcp-dodo-payments
plugins.description: The Dodo Payments MCP Server integrates with agentic frameworks to provide a lightweight, serverless-compatible interface for AI-driven payment operations like billing, subscriptions, and customer management. It enables autonomous agents to securely act on behalf of users using the Dodo Payments API.

plugins.name: mcp-domain-tools-whois-and-dns
plugins.description:
mcp-domaintools is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server providing DNS and WHOIS query capabilities for AI assistants. It enables AI models to perform DNS lookups both via local DNS resolvers and remote DNS-over-HTTPS services.

For local DNS queries, it uses the system's configured DNS servers. For remote DNS queries, it uses Cloudflare DNS-over-HTTPS queries with a fallback to Google DNS-over-HTTPS. This is more than enough for most use cases.

plugins.name: mcp-e2b
plugins.description: Execute code in secure cloud sandboxes

plugins.name: mcp-ecosystem-ai
plugins.description: The ecosystem.Ai runtime, Ecogentic Chat, and Dynamic runtime calling.

plugins.name: mcp-encore
plugins.description:
Encore turns Cursor into more than a coding tool. The open source framework lets you define infrastructure directly in your app code using Cursor's AI, so you can go from prompt to running on AWS in minutes. With Encore's built-in MCP, Cursor can introspect your app, call APIs, view traces, and more.

- Set up your project:
brew install encoredev/tap/encore && encore app create --example=ts/hello-world --llm-rules=cursor

- Learn more:
https://encore.dev

plugins.name: mcp-f2c-mcp-server
plugins.description:
🎨 Convert Figma design nodes to high-fidelity HTML/CSS markup, Industry-leading position
📚 Provides Figma design context to AI coding tools like Cursor
🚀 Supports Figma file URLs with fileKey and nodeId parameters

plugins.name: mcp-fetch
plugins.description: Fetch is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server designed for web content fetching and conversion, allowing Large Language Models (LLMs) to retrieve and process content from web pages by converting HTML into markdown for easier consumption.

plugins.name: mcp-figma
plugins.description: Proivde coding agents with design data direct from Figma for far more accurate design implementations in one-shot.

plugins.name: mcp-filesystem
plugins.description: Secure file operations with configurable access controls

plugins.name: mcp-firecrawl
plugins.description: Turn entire websites into LLM-ready data

plugins.name: mcp-gcp
plugins.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI assistants like Claude to interact with your Google Cloud Platform environment. This allows for natural language querying and management of your GCP resources during conversations.

plugins.name: mcp-gibsonai
plugins.description:
Effortlessly design, deploy, and scale production-grade databases in minutes. Just describe your requirements in natural language, and GibsonAI generates the rest:

- A managed, AI-optimized database usable from anywhere, including serverless functions
- CRUD API with documentation to manage your data
- ORM models and validation schemas
- Entity-Relationship Diagram (ERD) to visualize your database
- Distinct development and production environments
... and much more

Get started at gibsonai.com

plugins.name: mcp-github
plugins.description: This server provides integration with Github's issue tracking system through MCP, allowing LLMs to interact with Github issues.

plugins.name: mcp-gologin-mcp
plugins.description: Manage your GoLogin browser profiles and automation directly through AI conversations. This MCP server connects to the GoLogin API, letting you create, configure, and control browser profiles using natural language.

plugins.name: mcp-google-ads
plugins.description: An MCP tool that connects Google Ads with Claude AI, Cursor and others, allowing you to analyze your advertising data through natural language conversations. This integration gives you access to campaign information, performance metrics, keyword analytics, and ad management—all through simple chat with Claude, Cursor or Windsurf.

plugins.name: mcp-google-ads-mcp-by-trueclicks
plugins.description: Google Ads MCP by TrueClicks enables your AI (like Claude) to securely access and query your Google Ads account data. It supports both Windows and macOS, including Intel and ARM-based systems. It connects AIs to Google Ads using GAQL.app as a backend.

plugins.name: mcp-google-drive
plugins.description: File access and search capabilities for Google Drive

plugins.name: mcp-hyperbrowser
plugins.description: Cloud Browsers for AI Agents. Scrape, navigate, and interact with the web using Hyperbrowser's Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.

plugins.name: mcp-iceberg-mcp
plugins.description: IcebergMCP is an MCP server that lets you interact with your Apache Iceberg Lakehouse using natural language in Claude, Cursor, or any other MCP client.

plugins.name: mcp-inbox-zero
plugins.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI assistants like Claude to interact with your Inbox Zero account. This allows for natural language querying and management of your email during conversations.

plugins.name: mcp-infobip
plugins.description:
Infobip MCP Servers let you build AI agents to interact with the Infobip platform through the Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Connect to Infobip and enable your agents to perform actions, such as sending messages over channels like SMS, WhatsApp, or Viber, or managing customer data in a controlled, production-grade environment.
No more complex integrations or digging through endless documentation. Just plug in and let your AI do the talking.

plugins.name: mcp-instant-domain-search-mcp
plugins.description: Instant MCP brings the world’s fastest domain search into the tool too into Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor.

plugins.name: mcp-interactive-mcp
plugins.description: Interactive MCP is an AI‑enhanced MCP notification system that delivers real‑time chat completion alerts and gathers user feedback on the fly. Boost your workflow with instant, actionable notifications and seamless interactive feedback.

plugins.name: mcp-json-resume
plugins.description: Updates your resume as your code. Will add new skills and projects as you develop.

plugins.name: mcp-kong-konnect-3
plugins.description:
Manage your Kong Konnect API infrastructure right from your development environment.

Learn more about it here: https://developer.konghq.com/konnect-platform/konnect-mcp/

plugins.name: mcp-kubernetes
plugins.description: Manage pods, deployments, and services

plugins.name: mcp-lara-translate-mcp
plugins.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server for Lara Translate API, enabling powerful translation capabilities with support for language detection and context-aware translations.

plugins.name: mcp-linkedin-mcp-assistant
plugins.description:
LiGo MCP is the first Claude + ChatGPT integration built for LinkedIn creators.

It gives your AI assistant access to your post history - so it can analyze what works, write in your voice, and publish or schedule content directly.

Set it up once, use it daily. No prompt engineering needed.

Use it to:

- Build a LinkedIn-native content engine
- Post in your voice, fast
- Schedule straight from chat

plugins.name: mcp-logfire-mcp-server
plugins.description: This MCP server enables LLMs to retrieve your application's telemetry data, analyze distributed traces, and make use of the results of arbitrary SQL queries executed using the Logfire APIs.

plugins.name: mcp-logseq-mcp-tools
plugins.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides AI assistants with structured access to your Logseq knowledge graph.

plugins.name: mcp-mac-messages-mcp
plugins.description: An MCP server that securely interfaces with your iMessage database via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), allowing LLMs to query and analyze iMessage conversations. It includes robust phone number validation, attachment processing, contact management, group chat handling, and full support for sending and receiving messages.

plugins.name: mcp-mailtrap
plugins.description: Integrates with Mailtrap Email Platform to enable sending transactional emails via API.

plugins.name: mcp-maton
plugins.description: Connect to your SaaS tools like HubSpot, Salesforce, and more

plugins.name: mcp-mcp-linkedinads
plugins.description: Analyse your LinkedIn Ads performance. Compare to benchmarks and get optimisation recommendations.

plugins.name: mcp-mcp-mermaid
plugins.description: ❤️ Generate mermaid diagram and chart with AI MCP dynamically.

plugins.name: mcp-mcp-server-chart
plugins.description: 🤖 A visualization Model Context Protocol server for generating visual charts using AntV.

plugins.name: mcp-mcp-server-webcrawl
plugins.description:
Advanced search and retrieval for web crawler data.  

With mcp-server-webcrawl, your MCP client filters and analyzes web content under your direction or autonomously, extracting insights from your web content. 

The server includes a fulltext search interface with boolean support, resource filtering by type, HTTP status, headers, size, and more.  Support for WARC, wget, InterroBot, Katana, and SiteOne web crawlers is available out of the gate. 

mcp-server-webcrawl is open source.

plugins.name: mcp-metabase-mcp
plugins.description: Connect AI assistants to your Metabase analytics platform. Access dashboards, execute queries, and retrieve data seamlessly through conversational interfaces. Enhance your analytics experience with structured data access and robust error handling.

plugins.name: mcp-neon
plugins.description: Interact with the Neon serverless Postgres platform

plugins.name: mcp-obsidian
plugins.description: Read and search through Markdown notes in Obsidian vaults

plugins.name: mcp-obsidian-markdown-notes
plugins.description: Read and search through Markdown notes in Obsidian vaults

plugins.name: mcp-pearl
plugins.description: The Pearl MCP Server expands the ecosystem of MCP-compatible tools by introducing a distinctive type of tool: humans. Unlike traditional MCP implementations that connect to APIs or code snippets, this server enables AI agents (e.g., Claude, Cursor, GitHub Copilot) to interact with domain-specific human experts in real time. It offers a robust path for tasks that require nuanced judgment, contextual understanding, or legal, medical, and technical advice from certified professionals.

plugins.name: mcp-pgyer-mcp-server
plugins.description: MCP Server for PGYER platform, supports uploading, querying apps, etc.

plugins.name: mcp-postgresql
plugins.description: A Model Context Protocol server that provides read-only access to PostgreSQL databases. This server enables LLMs to inspect database schemas and execute read-only queries.

plugins.name: mcp-pre-dev-architect
plugins.description:
10x your coding agent with pre.dev. 

Ask pre.dev to help with any task and it will architect a complete solution ready for an agent to execute on.

plugins.name: mcp-prisma
plugins.description: Gives LLMs the ability to manage Prisma Postgres databases (e.g. spin up new databases and run migrations or queries)

plugins.name: mcp-prodmoh-mcp
plugins.description:
Prodmoh MCP brings your PRDs, user stories, acceptance criteria, and product requirements from your Prodmoh.com workspace directly into Cursor via MCP.
It eliminates context switching and gives Cursor’s AI full access to real product specs, enabling accurate code generation, API scaffolding, refactoring, and unit test creation using actual requirements.

Developers can fetch PRDs, search product docs, and generate aligned code/tests without leaving the editor.

plugins.name: mcp-pulsetic-mcp-server
plugins.description:
The Pulsetic MCP Server connects Pulsetic monitoring with AI agents and MCP-compatible tools, enabling direct access to uptime data, cron monitoring results, incident management workflows, and status page information through the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

It allows teams to securely expose operational monitoring data in a structured format, making it easy to build AI-driven automation, monitoring assistants, and intelligent operational workflows without custom middleware.

plugins.name: mcp-pulumi-mcp-server
plugins.description: The Pulumi Model Context Protocol (MCP) server enables AI-powered coding assistants to help you codify cloud architectures and get diffs for infrastructure changes right in your development environment

plugins.name: mcp-puppeteer
plugins.description: Puppeteer is a Model Context Protocol server that provides browser automation capabilities, allowing LLMs to interact with web pages, take screenshots, and execute JavaScript in a real browser environment.

plugins.name: mcp-qdrant
plugins.description: Implement semantic memory using the Qdrant vector search engine

plugins.name: mcp-raygun
plugins.description: Access crash reporting and monitoring data

plugins.name: mcp-red-telephone-keeping-a-human-in-the-loop
plugins.description: Stop AI hallucinations. A Human-in-the-Loop MCP server that pauses Agent execution and requests approval via Telegram before sensitive actions. Includes "Approve/Deny" buttons and customisable urgency levels.

plugins.name: mcp-resend
plugins.description: This is a simple MCP server that sends emails using Resend's API. Why? Now you can let Cursor or Claude Desktop compose emails for you and send it right away without having to copy and paste the email content.

plugins.name: mcp-rudderstack
plugins.description: This MCP server exposes RudderStack (Customer Data Infrastructure) workspaces to AI clients, enabling natural‑language pipeline inspection, debugging, and configuration changes from tools like Claude Desktop and Cursor.

plugins.name: mcp-sanity
plugins.description: Create, query, and manage Sanity content, releases, datasets, and schemas.

plugins.name: mcp-search1api
plugins.description: Unified API for search, crawling, and sitemaps

plugins.name: mcp-semilattice
plugins.description: Test content, personalise features, and A/B test decisions with accurate audience prediction. Semilattice MCP lets agents predict things about your audience. Your agent could predict which email subject line or website copy your audience would prefer. Or it could predict which use cases your audience wants in a new product experience. Audience predictions are >87% accurate on average and take <20 seconds to complete.

plugins.name: mcp-sentry
plugins.description: A Model Context Protocol server for retrieving and analyzing issues from Sentry.io. This server provides tools to inspect error reports, stacktraces, and other debugging information from your Sentry account.

plugins.name: mcp-settlemint
plugins.description: Leverage SettleMint's Model Context Protocol server to seamlessly interact with enterprise blockchain infrastructure. Build, deploy, and manage smart contracts through AI-powered assistants, streamlining your blockchain development workflow for maximum efficiency.

plugins.name: mcp-slack
plugins.description: Slack is a channel management and messaging solution that enables seamless interaction within workspaces, integrating with various tools for efficiency.

plugins.name: mcp-slidespeak
plugins.description: Create Presentation using MCP. SlideSpeak allows you to generate PowerPoint presentations with AI within seconds. Create, edit and modify presentations to automate reports, proposals and more.

plugins.name: mcp-snowflake
plugins.description: Interact with Snowflake databases

plugins.name: mcp-sqlite
plugins.description: Database interaction and business intelligence features

plugins.name: mcp-stripe
plugins.description: Interact with the Stripe API

plugins.name: mcp-supabase
plugins.description: This is an MCP server for PostgREST. It allows LLMs perform database queries and operations on Postgres databases via PostgREST.

plugins.name: mcp-suppr-mcp
plugins.description:
Suppr - AI-powered document translation and academic search service. Supports high-quality translation of PDF, DOCX, PPTX and other formats in 11 languages with optimized mathematical formula handling. Includes PubMed-integrated intelligent literature search for researchers.

API Endpoint: https://openapi.suppr.wilddata.cn
Web Portal: https://suppr.wilddata.cn

plugins.name: mcp-svgverseai-the-ai-vector-generator
plugins.description:
The SVGverseAI MCP Server lets you connect your AI agents, automation workflows, or creative tools directly to SVGverseAI’s image generation engine — without ever opening the app.

With just a few API calls, you can:

Generate SVG, PNG, or WebP images from text prompts
Convert raster images into vector graphics
Organize results inside your collections
Power your own design tools with SVGverseAI’s creative engine

🔗 Learn more: https://docs.svgverseai.com/mcp-reference/setup

plugins.name: mcp-tauri-development-mcp-server
plugins.description: Build, test, and debug mobile and desktop apps with the Tauri framework. Screenshots, DOM state, and console logs from your running app give the AI rich context to understand what's happening—and tools to interact with it.

plugins.name: mcp-tencent-rtc-mcp-tuicallkit
plugins.description: TUICallKit is an audio and video call UI component launched by Tencent RTC, supporting real-time communication with up to nine participants simultaneously. By integrating this component, you only need to write a few lines of code to add audio and video call features to your application.

plugins.name: mcp-terraform-mcp-server-by-binadox
plugins.description: MCP server for Terraform — automatically validates, secures, and estimates cloud costs for Terraform configurations. Developed by Binadox, it integrates with any Model Context Protocol (MCP) client (e.g. Claude Desktop or other MCP-compatible AI assistants).

plugins.name: mcp-ticket-tailor-mcp
plugins.description: The Ticket Tailor Model Context Protocol (MCP) server enables AI assistants to interact with your Ticket Tailor box office through a standardised interface. This allows you to manage events, tickets, orders, and more using natural language commands with compatible AI tools.

plugins.name: mcp-tinybird
plugins.description: Interface with the Tinybird serverless ClickHouse platform

plugins.name: mcp-todoist
plugins.description: Task management integration

plugins.name: mcp-token-metrics
plugins.description: The Token Metrics Model Context Protocol (MCP) server provides comprehensive cryptocurrency data, analytics, and insights through function calling. This server enables AI assistants and agents to access Token Metrics' powerful API for real-time crypto market data, trading signals, price predictions, and advanced analytics.

plugins.name: mcp-twelve-data-mcp-server
plugins.description: Twelve Data MCP Server delivers real-time and historical financial market data, including live quotes, statements, and analysis data. Twelve Data covers global stocks, forex, cryptocurrencies, ETFS, and more. It integrates seamlessly with trading platforms and tools, enabling developers to access and process market insights efficiently. Optimized for performance, the MCP server ensures accurate, timely data to support trading strategies and analytics.

plugins.name: mcp-twelvelabs
plugins.description: The TwelveLabs MCP Server provides seamless integration with the TwelveLabs platform. This server enables AI assistants and applications to interact with TwelveLabs powerful video analysis capabilities through a standardized MCP interface.

plugins.name: mcp-ucp-checker
plugins.description: Use a concise, benefit-driven summary: "Check if any domain supports Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP). Returns verification status, bot policies (GPTBot, ClaudeBot), and commerce capabilities for agentic workflows.

plugins.name: mcp-unleash
plugins.description: An MCP server for Unleash feature flagging, and your new best coding buddy. It provides API support as well as language- and framework-specific coding guidance for evaluating and wrapping new functionalities automatically.

plugins.name: mcp-upstash
plugins.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is a new, standardized protocol for managing context between large language models (LLMs) and external systems. In this repository, we provide an installer as well as an MCP Server for Upstash Developer API's.

plugins.name: mcp-urldna
plugins.description: Scan and analyze potentially malicious URLs using the urlDNA

plugins.name: mcp-vercel
plugins.description: Integrates with Vercel's serverless infrastructure to provide a lightweight endpoint for AI model interactions and tasks like chatbots, content generation, and data analysis.

plugins.name: mcp-vibe-1
plugins.description: The social layer for AI-assisted coding. See who's online, send DMs, share context -  without leaving your editor. First MCP server with live presence widget. 43 tools, 531 tests, works with Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, Cline, JetBrains.

plugins.name: mcp-xpack-ai-mcp-marketplace
plugins.description: XPack.AI is an incredible MCP platform that empowers your AI Agent to connect with thousands of real-world data sources and tools in under a minute. Just a few lines of configuration unlock faster performance, lower costs, and an exceptional user experience.

plugins.name: mcp-xquik
plugins.description: Xquik is a Real-time X (Twitter) data platform. 22 MCP tools for tweet search, user lookup, follower/following extraction, engagement metrics, giveaway draws, trending topics, account monitoring with webhooks, reply/retweet/quote extraction, community & Space data, and mutual follow checks. OAuth 2.1 + PKCE authentication, Streamable HTTP transport.

plugins.name: meta-prompt
plugins.description: Question-Answering Trajectory Analyzer

plugins.name: monorepo-tamagui
plugins.description: Monorepo using Tamagui

plugins.name: nango
plugins.description: Nango Integrations Best Practices

plugins.name: nestjs
plugins.description: Clean NestJs APIs with TypeScript Cursor Rules

plugins.name: netlify
plugins.description: Official Netlify Development Rules
